languages.text: {n}Абеляр издает недовольное ворчание.{/n} "Тем страннее, что {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Адептус Механикус{/g} так легко передают нам одного из своих бесценных собратьев. Вряд ли подобная щедрость продиктована исключительно великодушием".

traits.locale_text: [draft]"Тем странее, что Адептус Механикус так легко на это согласились".

{n}Абеляр издает недовольное ворчание.{/n} "Тем страннее, что {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Адептус Механикус{/g} так легко передают нам одного из своих бесценных собратьев. Вряд ли подобная щедрость продиктована исключительно великодушием".
traits.speaker: AbelardCompanion

languages.text: {n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."
languages.original_text: {n}Абеляр издает недовольное ворчание.{/n} "Тем страннее, что {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Адептус Механикус{/g} так легко передают нам одного из своих бесценных собратьев. Вряд ли подобная щедрость продиктована исключительно великодушием".

traits.locale_text: { n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

{ n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

{n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

{n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

{n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

languages.text: {n}Abelard stößt ein missmutiges Knurren aus.{/n} "Dann ist es umso eigenartiger, dass uns das {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} so bereitwillig einen ihrer unbezahlbaren Brüder überlassen würde. Es ist unwahrscheinlich, dass diese Großzügigkeit allein auf Edelmut beruht."
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard stößt ein missmutiges Knurren aus.{/n} "Dann ist es umso eigenartiger, dass uns das {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} so bereitwillig einen ihrer unbezahlbaren Brüder überlassen würde. Es ist unwahrscheinlich, dass diese Großzügigkeit allein auf Edelmut beruht."

languages.text: {n}Abélard pousse un grognement mécontent.{/n} « C’est vraiment étrange que l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} nous livre l'un de leurs inestimables confrères aussi facilement. Il est peu probable qu'une telle générosité soit dépourvue d'arrière-pensées. »
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abélard pousse un grognement mécontent.{/n} « C’est vraiment étrange que l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} nous livre l'un de leurs inestimables confrères aussi facilement. Il est peu probable qu'une telle générosité soit dépourvue d'arrière-pensées. »

languages.text: {n}阿贝拉德不满地咕哝了一声。{/n}“既然如此，那便愈发蹊跷了——{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}机械修会{/g}怎么会如此爽快地将他们一位弥足珍贵的同僚交予我们。这般慷慨，恐怕并非仅仅出于大度。”
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿贝拉德不满地咕哝了一声。{/n}“既然如此，那便愈发蹊跷了——{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}机械修会{/g}怎么会如此爽快地将他们一位弥足珍贵的同僚交予我们。这般慷慨，恐怕并非仅仅出于大度。”

languages.text: {n}Abelard suelta un gruñido insatisfecho.{/n} «Resulta más que curioso que el {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} nos haya entregado a uno de sus valiosos hermanos con tanta facilidad. Dudo mucho que lo hayan hecho solo por magnanimidad».
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard suelta un gruñido insatisfecho.{/n} «Resulta más que curioso que el {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} nos haya entregado a uno de sus valiosos hermanos con tanta facilidad. Dudo mucho que lo hayan hecho solo por magnanimidad».

languages.text: {n}アベラードが不満げにうなる。{/n}「ならば、なおさら奇妙な話です。{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}アデプトゥス・メカニクス{/g}が、かけがえのない同胞の一人をこうもあっさり我々に引き渡すとは。これほどの気前の良さが、ただの度量の大きさだけによるものとは考えにくいでしょう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

traits.locale_text: {n}アベラードが不満げにうなる。{/n}「ならば、なおさら奇妙な話です。{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}アデプトゥス・メカニクス{/g}が、かけがえのない同胞の一人をこうもあっさり我々に引き渡すとは。これほどの気前の良さが、ただの度量の大きさだけによるものとは考えにくいでしょう。」

languages.text: {n}Abelard, hoşnutsuz bir homurtu çıkarıyor.{/n} "O hâlde {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus'un{/g} paha biçilmez kardeşlerinden birini bize bu kadar çabuk teslim etmesi çok daha tuhaf. Bu kadar cömertliğin sadece yüce gönüllülükten kaynaklanması pek olası değil."
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard, hoşnutsuz bir homurtu çıkarıyor.{/n} "O hâlde {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus'un{/g} paha biçilmez kardeşlerinden birini bize bu kadar çabuk teslim etmesi çok daha tuhaf. Bu kadar cömertliğin sadece yüce gönüllülükten kaynaklanması pek olası değil."
